title: Beurer LS 06 / LS 10 Luggage Scales Ideal for Air Travel
features: Small and portable luggage scale, perfect for travelling
Ergonomic handle for easy and comfortable weighing
Easy to read blue back lit LCD display
Measuring tape within the device (1m / 3 ft)
Conversion from kg/lb, g/oz with a 50 kg load bearing capacity
description: From the manufacturer Beurer LS06 Luggage Scale Weighing Scale Ideal for Air Travel Say good-bye to rechecking your luggage at the check-in counter or paying extra for excess baggage with one of our latest innovations- portable luggage scales! Easy to use, these handy scales make ideal travelling companions. They even come equipped with a handy measuring tape to avoid further charges for over-sized luggage. Small and handy with a fastening strap for space-saving storage you can just pop in your bag and have them ready for the return trip. Not just for travel If you’re not such a frequent flyer and think this device may be a little redundant these clever scales will also help you with weighing oddly-shaped items. Just hang a basket or bag from the strap, reset the display to zero and then read the weight of the item or even that parcel you need to send. With a weight capacity of 40g the LCD display can adjusted between g/oz/kg/lb.
